name: Black Grape Foam
recipeIngredient: 2 lbs black grapes (may substitute any wine grape)
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and stem the grapes.
2. Pass the grapes through a food mill, allowing no seeds to pass but including all pieces of pulp on skin that come through.
3. Refrigerate the grape pulp.
4. Make simple syrup by heating sugar and water until clear.
5. When ingredients are cold, add simple syrup to grape pulp.
6. Add lemon juice and zest and stir to mix well.
7. Whip cream to soft peaks and fold into the cold grape mixture.
8. Place in an ice cream machine and chill following the machine's instructions.
9. When finished, pour into 2-ounce Dixie cups.
10. Cover with plastic wrap and freeze.
11. To serve, remove from freezer and allow to stand for 10 minutes.
12. Unmold into a martini glass and garnish with fresh cream and clean grapes.
Yield: 4 servings
